description: Perform data quality assurance on an outbreak dataset (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiInfoData\Ebola_Check.csv) using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis. Identify records where DateOnset occurs before DateExposure or DateReport occurs before DateOnset. Generate a list of these invalid records including only the variables GlobalID, DateExposure, DateOnset, and DateReport. Save the output to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiInfoData\Temporal_Errors.html.
